content:
Hello! I have started the game today and have tried to take a look around to have a general grasp on what to do…HOWEVER, I’m dumb and confused lol. These are the characters that I have pulled, wanted to ask a general idea when it comes to team building and what I should be using for the time being!
If possible, I also wanted to ask what I should be pulling for when it comes to the daily banner that changes every day!

Thank you all in advance for the help ❤️
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content: I'm not an expert so here are a few basic ideas:
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content: 1. Determine which character will be the carry‌. In those characters you already have, it can be Sorel or Uvhash.
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content: 2.For supporter members, it's strongly recomended to have characters that  can inflict Weakness and Vulnerable, you can find them from Doll and Ogier.
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content: 3. It will be a better start with a better carry, and the character will maintain its value well if the one are doing good as a supporter. So here are 2 recomended characters: [Murphy: Fauxborn] in June 10th, [Arachne] in June 15th.
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content: Thank you for the Tips!
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content: +guides
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content:
Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:

## General Guide
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly

## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content: Thank you! I think I’ll probably end up pulling for Thais, Vortice and Arachne as I found both Murphy and Tawil
thread_title: Beginner needs help!

content:
Been using that line up for a long while now (which i asked for here), i've been getting more characters for the sake of the gamba i guess but haven't looked into making new teams with them, i suppose i have enough characters now to have at least a couple more teams.

I'll take anything that's to be honest, i've seen some characters aren't good unless you get multiple copies like Kathi but other than that i don't know which ones are like that.
Thanks to whoever decides to leave anything. 🙏
thread_title: Help making more teams for a dummy.

content: Help making more teams for a dummy.
thread_title: Help making more teams for a dummy.

content:
Ermm

Poison— Xu + Gdoll+ Nymph (this is because your Nymph is like high copies) + Agrippa/Karen but you can also go Xu+ Arachne/Liz. She's not picky.

Vortice— Gmurph, Sanga Celeste, but she's also not picky. You can even do Vortice + Tawil with Sanga Celeste if you prefer that instead.
thread_title: Help making more teams for a dummy.

content:
Thanks, i will give both ones a shot. 🙏 
I really need to learn how to team building.
thread_title: Help making more teams for a dummy.

content: it doesnt mean they all work in the same team

content: its just a quick and dirty guide to see what else you can run

content: running a lot of them in the same team is usually not a bad idea though
